name: Dust
description: Dust 是一款帮助企业构建 AI agents 的平台，专注把内部知识、流程和工具连接起来，让团队快速落地可用的 agent 工作流。
description_en: Dust is a platform that helps businesses build AI agents, connecting internal knowledge, workflows, and tools to deploy usable agent workflows quickly.
why_matters: Dust 刚完成 4000 万美元 Series B，累计融资已超过 6000 万美元；由 Sequoia 和 Abstract 共同领投，还获得 Datadog 与 Snowflake 参与，说明它在企业 AI agents 赛道具备明显的资本验证与市场关注度。
why_matters_en: Dust just closed a $40M Series B, bringing total funding to over $60M; it was co-led by Sequoia and Abstract with participation from Datadog and Snowflake, showing strong capital validation in enterprise AI agents.
latest_news: 2026-05: 由 Sequoia 与 Abstract 共同领投完成 4000 万美元 Series B。
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Closed a $40M Series B co-led by Sequoia and Abstract.

name: Memoket Gem
description: 一款主打“全天记住对话”的AI可穿戴设备，强调会议、采访和日常记录。
why_matters: “记住你所有对话”的记忆型AI硬件，场景非常清晰，适合会议与个人知识留存，是典型的创新形态+明确场景组合。
latest_news: 2026-05: 于Launly上线并获得早期关注与投票。

name: Nectar Social
description: Nectar Social 是一个 AI 驱动的社交营销平台，帮助品牌把社交内容、受众洞察和转化动作连接起来，提高营销投放效率。
description_en: Nectar Social is an AI-driven social marketing platform that helps brands connect social content, audience insights, and conversion actions to improve marketing efficiency.
why_matters: Nectar Social 在 2026-05-15 完成 3000 万美元 Series A，由 Menlo Ventures 和 Anthology Fund 领投，且 Anthology Fund 与 Anthropic 合作成立；这说明它已获得一线资本对 AI 原生营销/社交发现路径的明确押注。
why_matters_en: Nectar Social closed a $30M Series A on 2026-05-15, led by Menlo Ventures and Anthology Fund, which was created in partnership with Anthropic; this signals strong top-tier investor conviction in AI-native social marketing and discovery workflows.
latest_news: 2026-05: 完成 3000 万美元 Series A 融资，Menlo Ventures 与 Anthology Fund 领投。
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Raised a $30M Series A led by Menlo Ventures and Anthology Fund.

name: Bunch
description: Bunch 是一个面向 private markets 运营的 AI-native 平台，重点帮助 VC 和投资团队提升尽调、运营与协作效率。
description_en: Bunch is an AI-native platform for private markets operations, designed to help VC and investment teams improve diligence, operations, and collaboration efficiency.
why_matters: Bunch 在 Series B 融资中拿到 3500 万美元，定位又是 private markets 运营层的 AI-native 平台，说明它在金融基础设施里有明确的产品化空间。
why_matters_en: Bunch raised $35M in Series B funding and targets AI-native private markets operations, giving it a clear product lane in financial infrastructure.
latest_news: 2026-05: 宣布完成 3500 万美元 Series B。

top_comments_sample: Here are few things we're working on next around safety: - Dynamic permissions for agents: agents get API keys with limited scope. Whenever they need to expand the permission, they will ask you for approval. And the expanded scope only applies to the CURRENT task. - Reversible: Git for backend. All the write operations will be snapshotted, so if agents make terrible mistakes, you can always roll back.
Congrats on the launch! I recently tried InsForge for a personal project a few weeks ago and thought the getting started experience was really smooth.
Nice one!

Congrats on the launch. Currently all my hobby projects go like procure auth from clerk, database from neon, vercel/cloudflare for deployment, etc etc. This could actually solve that problem. Is there a local simulator that can be used for testing and then replicated easily in prod?

Hey Hang, thanks for sharing it and a cool product, I will try this out, just noticed that https://insforge.dev/ does not have any trust portal or security page, you can create one by using sekorti in 5 minutes.
We're open source so you can self host: https://github.com/InsForge/InsForge

latest_news: 2026-05: 产品页在 DROIX 上线，主打触控屏与 AI/Peer Sharing。

name: LetinAR AI Glasses Optics
description: 为 AI 眼镜提供纳米级微型光学方案，让“像指甲盖一样小”的镜片支撑真正可穿戴的 AI 眼镜。
why_matters: 它不是普通眼镜产品本体，而是 AI 眼镜时代的核心光学底座；镜片缩小到指甲盖级别，直接推动轻量化与可穿戴性，是形态创新链条里的关键环节。
latest_news: 2026-05: 获得 1850 万美元新融资，累计融资 4170 万美元，面向 AI 眼镜市场扩产。

name: Prelude
description: Prelude 是一家法国数字 onboarding 创业公司，利用 AI 自动化客户入职与合规流程，帮助企业更快完成身份验证和转化。
description_en: Prelude is a French digital onboarding startup using AI to automate customer onboarding and compliance workflows, helping businesses verify users and convert faster.
why_matters: 这轮 Series A 由 20VC 领投，金额达到 $20M；如果其 AI 驱动的 onboarding 自动化能显著降低人工审核成本并缩短开通时间，它有机会成为欧洲合规自动化赛道的重要玩家。
why_matters_en: This Series A was led by 20VC and reached $20M; if its AI-driven onboarding automation materially cuts manual review costs and speeds up activation, it could become a key player in Europe’s compliance automation stack.
latest_news: 2026-05: Tech.eu 报道 Prelude 完成 $20M Series A，由 20VC 领投，用于扩展数字 onboarding 产品。
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Tech.eu reported that Prelude closed a $20M Series A led by 20VC to expand its digital onboarding product.

name: Ocean
description: Ocean 是一个 agentic email security platform，专门用来对抗 AI-powered phishing 和其他自动化攻击。
description_en: Ocean is an agentic email security platform built to fight AI-powered phishing and other automated attacks.
why_matters: Ocean 刚从 stealth 出来，总融资达到 2800 万美元，并获得 Lightspeed 等机构支持；它切的是 AI 驱动钓鱼攻击升级后的安全防护需求，属于高紧迫度企业安全赛道。
why_matters_en: Ocean just emerged from stealth with $28M in total funding and backing from Lightspeed; it addresses the urgent need for protection against AI-driven phishing and other escalated security threats.
latest_news: 2026-05: 从 stealth 期公开亮相，定位为对抗 AI phishing 的 agentic 邮件安全平台。

top_comments_sample: So a leasing company bought the source code for $2.5 million and then cut off owners after they refused an additional deal. What was the point, then? Is there anything rational about this market interaction?
Oh, not the owners of the company, the owners of the cars the company made.

I'd buy any Tesla, even the big truck, if it came with open source software! I don't want a car that's spyware like a phone. Let me be in control of it, let me mod it, let me own it. Who's going to sell me one?

Fisker may have been especially vulnerable to this (my understanding from some very brief searching is that core vehicle functionality required cloud check ins without fallback), but nothing about this is inherent to EVs (this is response to Weisenthal's tweet early in the article). An ICE vehicle could (and many manufacturers are increasingly pushing in this direction) have the exact same problems. This is a much bigger problem that requires a bigger solution. I'm pretty intrigued by the mention at the end that several european manufacturers are collaborating on an opensource automotive software platform, although their track record on software isn't that encouraging.
> No more over-the-air updates. No more connected services. No more warranty. LLM slop. Why does the author believe he is entitled to our attention if he cannot even bother to use his own words?

How involved is the software in the car, any while driving features? I'd be a little bit afraid of getting in that car even with the best efforts of the community, maybe it's not really for driving, i'd be even more nervous to get in a car with no updates, but still.

"We need more open source in the auto industry" Uh no, we need significantly less software in the auto industry. Software sucks. It excels at taking relatively simple (if inconvenient) problems and in exchange for some notional convenience introduces problem spaces so baroque they border on the occult. An example: between all of the seat controls on the driver's seat of my wife's car I've counted 16 individual switch positions and something like six motors, all wired into the CAN bus so the central console can save user preferences. Without bothering to check the OEM parts cost to replace that seat I am absolutely dead ass certain that it by itself costs more than my first three cars combine
This reads very AI. Pangram [0] agrees [1]. [0] Not perfect, but I think as good evidence as any: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2501.15654 [1] https://www.pangram.com/history/44cd07d3-ba94-4331-8c7f-a626...

> We had reviewed the Ocean in late 2023 and found the hardware genuinely attractive — but the software was simply not ready for prime time. The irony of that headline — “Coming soon, in a future software update” — now reads like an epitaph. Those future updates never came from Fisker. They came from the owners themselves. It’s sad to see a good site put out bad AI writing like this.
Car owners the current title changes the meaning

community_verdict.summary: The comments argue that the Fisker situation shows the risks of cars depending on cloud services and software that can be taken away after a company fails. Several users say the real issue is not just EVs, but the broader trend toward too much software and connected functionality in cars. Others are skeptical of the article itself, noting that parts of it read like AI-generated slop or misuse the meaning of the title.

name: Viktor

name: Humanoid
description: Humanoid 正在推进面向工厂部署的人形机器人方案，将 AI、机器人控制与工业场景结合，目标是大规模进入制造业。
description_en: Humanoid is advancing humanoid robot solutions for factory deployment, combining AI, robot control, and industrial use cases at manufacturing scale.
why_matters: Scaling Europe Daily 提到 Humanoid 与德国工厂签署部署协议，计划向工厂投放数千台机器人；这意味着它已从概念验证进入真实工业落地阶段，属于强场景牵引的机器人创业公司。
why_matters_en: Scaling Europe Daily says Humanoid signed a German factory deal to deploy thousands of robots; this suggests it has moved beyond proof-of-concept into real industrial deployment, a strong use-case-driven robotics startup.
latest_news: 2026-05: 与德国工厂签署部署协议，计划投放数千台机器人。
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Signed a German factory deployment deal aimed at placing thousands of robots.

top_comments_sample: Genuine question. Define cleaning? Does it mostly wipe off surfaces or can it also do things like scrub toilets, make beds, take out trash, etc? Also is this fully automated or is someone sitting in an office with a VR headset? How monitored is the whole process? Lastly, specs on the robot you used in the landing page? I'm genuinely curious. When I get back to SF in a few weeks I may hit you up. My place could use a deep cleaning.

Awesome job! It really frees up my hands. As another reviewer mentioned, I’m so curious to know exactly what this robot can do when cleaning a room, how thoroughly it cleans, and who can monitor its status and how.

Almost definitely 100% teleoperated -- the robot might move between places autonomously, but all the manipulation tasks, i.e., the actual cleaning, is not something anyone yet knows how to do autonomously reliably. And that's OK. However I'd like to know whether the data you gather from these cleanings is shared with other companies (who would be willing to pay a lot of money for it in order to train their own physical AI models).

> Almost definitely 100% teleoperated Looking at X Ai's Figure parcel sorting live-stream, the current robots seem way too clumsy to even pick up an object, I doubt they are precise enough to do scrubbing.

description: DIC在苏黎世设立投资平台，专注支持把 AI 融入机器人、传感器和自动化等真实世界系统的 Physical AI 初创公司。

latest_news: 2026-05: Global Venturing 报道 DIC 以苏黎世为基地设立 DIC D2S Ventures AG，启动 6200 万美元 Physical AI 投资平台。

description: Status AI 是一个 gamified AI social world，正在把虚拟身份、社交互动和生成式 AI 结合成可玩性更强的新型 AI 社交产品。
description_en: Status AI is a gamified AI social world combining virtual identity, social interaction, and generative AI into a more playable social product.
why_matters: 该公司刚完成累计 1700 万美元的 Seed+Series A 融资，且切入“AI 社交世界”这一较新赛道；从结果看，产品已经吸引了超过 1300 万个虚拟世界创建，说明其在用户参与度上有明显早期牵引。
why_matters_en: The company just raised a combined $17M Seed + Series A and is targeting the emerging AI social world category; the snippet also claims users have created over 13 million virtual worlds, indicating meaningful early engagement.
latest_news: 2026-05: Status AI announced $17M in combined seed and Series A funding from General Catalyst and YC to build a gamified AI social world.
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Status AI announced $17M in combined seed and Series A funding from General Catalyst and YC to build a gamified AI social world.

name: Ema
description: Ema 是面向企业员工的 Enterprise Generative AI 系统，强调安全性、准确性和与企业工具的深度协作，帮助员工更高效地完成复杂任务。
description_en: Ema is an enterprise generative AI system for employees, emphasizing security, accuracy, and deep integration with enterprise tools to simplify complex tasks.
why_matters: 该产品明确获得了 5000 万美元 Series A 融资，资金信号强；同时其定位不是通用聊天助手，而是面向企业流程的 secure enterprise generative AI system，更接近可落地的 Agent 层企业基础设施。
why_matters_en: Ema has a clear $50M Series A funding signal, and it is positioned not as a generic chatbot but as a secure enterprise generative AI system for workflows, making it a more enterprise-ready agent layer.
latest_news: 2026-05: Ema was listed with $50M Series A funding on startups.gallery.
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Ema was listed with $50M Series A funding on startups.gallery.

top_comments_sample: The original title is: > Iowa lawmakers move to mandate students take Center for Intellectual Freedom classes amid low enrollment

Things to know that the article doesn't mention: Christopher Rufo was the invited speaker for the opening event, and the interim director is UI economics professor Luciano I. de Castro[1]. In 2025 de Castro cited extreme bias in advocating for the creation of the center[2]. The sponsor of the bill to create the center, Rep. Taylor Collins, R-Mediapolis also said while working to advance an earlier bill to ban DEI spending at public universities, "the bill is needed because the three universities are spending too much on DEI officers and programs. He said the salaries for the top four DEI professionals across the regents universities add up to about $750,000 per year."[3] 1 https://www.thegaz
Nothing says freedom like being forced to go to a re-education camp.

At first, I thought the saddest part was: "The nonprofit Common Sense Institute reported student interest and enrollment was low — with just eight students in one class. The report said enrollment is unlikely to grow unless the state mandated students take the classes, which is exactly what Republican lawmakers passed." But despite the overtly Orwellian effort, the Democrats responded in typical ineffectual, tone-deaf fashion: "Democratic Sen. Janet Petersen slammed that idea, arguing it will drive up costs for Iowa college students and their families." Costs. Yeah. That's the problem.

This is really light on details. What exactly is this? Perhaps I'm in the minority, but I think intellectual freedom is a cornerstone of democracy and freedom. We should want people to have freedom of thought. The headline makes it seem like some crazy right wing nut job, indoctrination camp, but don't we want people to have free intellectualism?
What is "center" in this context?
Likely Homelander's Freedom Camps.
Cost of living is the only message that seems to work in the Trump era. I understand why they’re using it.
"Common Sense Institute"? Life imitates satire once again, it seems.
It was almost named after Charlie Kirk. It is, in fact, an indoctrination camp.

community_verdict.summary: 社区重点讨论了产品价值与落地细节。评论情绪整体偏中性分歧，并反复提及可用性与真实场景。这类反馈可用于判断短期需求强度是否能转化为持续增长。 用户反馈既包含认可，也提出了执行层面的质疑。 对 PM 来说，关键是验证需求强度与可持续增长。

name: Vesence
description: Vesence 是一款面向律师事务所的 AI agent 平台，直接在 Microsoft Word 和 Outlook 中检查合同、邮件与项目，帮助在客户看到之前发现错误与不一致。
description_en: Vesence is an AI agent platform for law firms that works inside Microsoft Word and Outlook to review contracts, emails, and projects before clients see them.
why_matters: Vesence 完成了 900 万美元种子轮融资，由 Emergence 领投，Creandum、Y Combinator 和 20VC 参与，且还有 Paul Graham、Anton Osika 等天使投资人；它把法律工作流直接嵌入 Microsoft Office，主打合同审查、定义词检查、交叉引用和合规问题捕捉。
why_matters_en: Vesence raised a $9M seed round led by Emergence, with participation from Creandum, Y Combinator, and 20VC, plus angels including Paul Graham and Anton Osika. It embeds legal QA agents directly into Microsoft Office for contract review, defined-term checks, cross-reference validation, and compliance issue detection.
latest_news: 2026-05: Vesence 宣布完成 900 万美元种子轮融资，继续扩展面向律师事务所的 Microsoft Office 内 AI agent 工作流。
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Vesence announced a $9M seed round to expand its Microsoft Office-native AI agent workflow for law firms.

name: Pivot
description: Pivot 是一家面向采购流程的 AI 平台，帮助企业自动化供应商管理、采购工作流与审批协作，主打把原本繁琐的 procurement 变成可编排的 AI 驱动流程。
description_en: Pivot is an AI platform for procurement that automates supplier management, purchasing workflows, and approvals, turning complex procurement into an AI-driven process.
why_matters: 该公司刚完成 $40M Series B，并由 Forestay Capital 与 Notion Capital 共同领投，说明它已从早期验证进入规模化阶段；如果能把采购自动化落到大客户流程里，采购这一高频但低效的企业场景会有很强的 ROI。
why_matters_en: Pivot just closed a $40M Series B co-led by Forestay Capital and Notion Capital, showing it has moved beyond validation into scale; if it can automate procurement workflows inside large enterprises, the ROI opportunity is substantial.
latest_news: 2026-05: Pivot 以 $40M Series B 融资推进 AI procurement 自动化。
latest_news_en: 2026-05: Pivot raised a $40M Series B to push AI procurement automation forward.

name: Nourish
description: Nourish 是一款 healthtech 平台，提供 AI-powered 的健康服务能力，近期完成 1 亿美元融资，显示出强劲的市场扩张势头。
description_en: Nourish is a healthtech platform with AI-powered healthcare services that recently raised $100M, signaling strong expansion momentum.
why_matters: 1 亿美元融资已经超过 dark horse 的高门槛，说明市场对其产品和商业化路径有足够信心；同时它位于 AI+healthtech 交叉领域，通常意味着更高的客单价、更长生命周期和更强的行业壁垒。
why_matters_en: $100M financing clears the top dark-horse threshold and indicates strong market confidence; its AI + healthtech positioning also suggests higher ACV, longer retention, and stronger vertical moats.
latest_news: 2026-05-19：Nourish 在 NYC startup funding 报道中披露获得 1 亿美元融资。
latest_news_en: 2026-05-19: Nourish was featured in the NYC startup funding report after raising $100M.

name: Meta Ray-Ban Smart Glasses
description: 带摄像头与语音 AI 的智能眼镜，强调第一人称记录、问答与随拍随问。
why_matters: 智能眼镜是最成熟的非手机 AI 载体之一，兼具佩戴属性、第一视角采集和自然语音交互。
latest_news: 2024-05: 与 Ray-Ban 相关的 AI 眼镜被列为新硬件形态代表。

name: Evertune
description: Evertune 是一个专注于 Generative Engine Optimization（GEO）的 AI 营销与发现平台，帮助品牌优化在 AI 搜索与生成式答案中的可见度。
description_en: Evertune is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and AI marketing platform that helps brands improve visibility in AI search and generated answers.
why_matters: Evertune 在 2025 年完成 1500 万美元 Series A，由 Felicis Ventures 领投，聚焦 GEO 这一新兴类别，直接面向 AI 搜索时代的品牌曝光与发现问题，属于典型的类别创新型产品。
why_matters_en: Evertune raised a $15M Series A led by Felicis Ventures and targets the emerging GEO category, tackling brand visibility in AI search and generated answers with a clear category-creation angle.
latest_news: 2025-08: 公司宣布完成 1500 万美元 Series A 融资，并继续扩展其 AI marketing 与 discovery platform。
latest_news_en: 2025-08: The company announced a $15M Series A round and continues expanding its AI marketing and discovery platform.
